summary: All three requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is covered by the updated frontend/src/index.css with violet primary, pink background, yellow grid tokens, and near-black foreground in both light and dark modes. REQ-2 is covered by the updated frontend/tailwind.config.js with new violet/pink/yellow/black color tokens mapped from CSS variables. REQ-3 is covered by the updated SparkParticles.tsx replacing warm brown/skin-tone colors with violet, pink, and yellow pill color schemes.
